layers.empty: No layers on the map yet.
layers.performanceHint: Many active layers can slow down the map.

chat.placeholder: Ask a question about Swiss geodata …
chat.welcome: Ask questions about Swiss geodata – for example:
chat.exampleFlood: Show me flood hazards in Valais
chat.exampleSolar: How suitable are roofs in Bern for solar panels?
chat.formatUnsupported: This data format is not supported yet.

legend.error: The legend could not be loaded.

geocatalog.error: The geocatalog could not be loaded.
geocatalog.unsupported: Not available as a map layer.
geocatalog.loadFailed: The layer could not be loaded.

feedback.error: The feedback could not be sent. Please try again.

about.description: SGS LLM is an open-source prototype making Swiss federal geodata accessible through natural language: a chat interface, an interactive map, and connectors to the official swisstopo services. The project is developed in the context of the Swiss Geoinformation Strategy (SGS).

builtBy.ageospatial: Frontend, web map, and swisstopo API connectors
builtBy.askearth: LLM provisioning, agent and MCP integration, testing framework
builtBy.for: For swisstopo, financed in the context of the Swiss Geoinformation Strategy (SGS).

dataSources.geoadmin: Public REST services of the federal geoinformation platform (geo.admin.ch)

about.disclaimer: Prototype – not for operational use. Content and functionality may change at any time during the prototype phase.

locate.unavailable: Your location could not be determined.
